zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Baston於大約1648年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可薩萊姆。他於1673年與Hannah Cloyes在美國緬因州約克威爾斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1713年5月3日在美國緬因州約克威爾斯享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Baston于大约1648年出生在美国马萨诸塞州艾可薩萊姆。他于1673年与Hannah Cloyes在美国缅因州約克威爾斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1713年5月3日在美国缅因州約克威爾斯享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andree, Almira, Pierre.

French and English (of Norman origin): from Old French bastun ‘stick’, used as a nickname for a dignitary who carried a staff as part of his function, or perhaps for an officious person, or someone who walked with the aid of a stick.
English: habitational name from Baston in Lincolnshire, named with the Old Norse personal name Bak + Old English tūn ‘farmstead’.

variants.name: Bastone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Ettore, Cesare, Pasquale, Pietro, Santo, Vincenzo.
Italian: metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of staffs and sticks, or a nickname for a thin or rigid-looking person, from bastone ‘stick’.

variants.name: Baton
meanings: French (Bâton): nickname from bâton (Old French bastun) ‘stick’; see Baston 1.
English and Scottish: variant of   Batten  .
History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Baston was born about 1648, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, United States. He married Hannah Cloyes in 1673, in Wells, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 3 May 1713, in Wells, York, Maine, United States, at the age of 66.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bastonは約1648年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスサレムで生まれた。1673年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズでHannah Cloyesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1713年5月3日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Baston(은)는 대략 1648년 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 살렘에서 태어났다. 그는 1673년 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 Hannah Cloyes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1713년 5월 3일 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Baston nasceu aproximadamente 1648, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Ele casou-se com Hannah Cloyes em 1673, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 3 de maio de 1713, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Baston родился около 1648 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Cloyes в 1673 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 3 мая 1713 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Baston nació aproximadamente 1648, en Salem, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Se casó con Hannah Cloyes en 1673, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 3 de mayo de 1713, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 66 años.
